title: Cart-First Checkout
purpose: Teach the agent to use the CORE-028 UCP cart handoff instead of bypassing cart.
when_to_use: The user selected one public catalog variant.
The agent needs an estimate before checkout.
The agent needs to create a checkout from cart_id.
A first-time wild agent may receive auth_qr before payment QR.

commands.intent: create a cart estimate for the selected UCP Variant.id
commands.success_signal: response.cart.cart_id is present and agent_next_actions includes create_checkout_from_cart
response.checkout.checkout_id is present; if response.checkout.next_required_action is auth_qr, show response.checkout.human_action and poll/resume until payment_intent_id appears

commands.intent: do both steps through the high-level command
commands.success_signal: response.status is waiting_human_auth, waiting_user_payment, payment_verified, or delivery_claimable

agent_rules: CORE-028 MVP supports exactly one cart line and quantity 1.
Use cart_id as the checkout handoff.
Do not override cart line_items during checkout.
If the same cart is retried, expect the same checkout unless contact/client reference changes.
The backend revalidates catalog, price, and delivery requirements.
For first purchase, auth_qr means provider login/registration consent, not payment.
For first purchase, show the ItPay auth entry as one human orchestration entry; after provider OAuth callback the same checkout exposes payment.
After showing auth_qr, poll checkout or run buyer checkout resume until identity_status becomes identity_resolved and payment_intent_id appears.
forbidden: Do not call legacy checkout directly for CORE-028 external-agent tests.
Do not pass a different variant in checkout after cart is created.
Do not create a second cart/checkout after a retryable timeout unless the user asks to abandon the previous one.

next_docs.condition: Checkout has payment_intent_id and payment QR is needed
